# Kandangi Sarees

> Kandangi Sarees is an Indian handloom e-commerce platform specialising in
> authenticated handwoven silk and cotton sarees sourced directly from weavers.
> Collections span Kanjivaram, Gadwal, Venkatagiri, Mangalgiri, Kuppadam,
> Rajkot Patola, Tussar, Raw Silk, Soft Silk, Chettinad, Narayanapet,
> Khadi, and Pen Kalamkari varieties.

## Core Navigation

- [Homepage](https://kandangisarees.com/): Brand overview and featured collections
- [All Collections](https://kandangisarees.com/collection): Full product catalogue with filter by weave, fabric, and price
- [About](https://kandangisarees.com/about): Brand story, sourcing philosophy, and weaver partnerships
- [Contact](https://kandangisarees.com/contact): Customer support and enquiries

## Silk Sarees

- [Kanjivaram Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/kanjivaram-silk): Authenticated Kanjivaram handloom sarees from Kanchipuram weavers — pure mulberry silk, temple borders, genuine zari
- [Gadwal Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/gadwal-silk): Gadwal silk from Telangana — cotton body with pure silk borders and pallu
- [Venkatagiri Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/venkatagiri-silk): Ultra-fine cotton-silk blend with delicate jamdani motifs from Andhra Pradesh
- [Mangalgiri Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/mangalgiri-silk): Mangalgiri silk sarees with signature nizam zari border
- [Kuppadam Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/kuppadam-silk): Rare silk-cotton Kuppadam weave with richly contrasting borders from Andhra Pradesh
- [Rajkot Patola Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/patola-silk): Vibrant single-ikat Rajkot Patola sarees from Gujarat
- [Raw Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/raw-silk): Natural textured raw silk sarees — matte sheen, earthy palette
- [Tussar Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/tussar-silk): Wild Tussar silk with natural golden hue and grainy texture from Jharkhand
- [Soft Silk](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/soft-silk): Lightweight pure silk sarees with smooth drape — Bangalore and Mysore tradition
- [Pen Kalamkari](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/pen-kalamkari): Hand-painted Kalamkari art sarees from Srikalahasti using bamboo pen and natural dyes

## Cotton Sarees

- [Chettinad Cotton](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/chettinad-cotton): Bold checks and vibrant colours from Tamil Nadu weavers — durable daily-wear handloom
- [Narayanapet Cotton](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/narayanapet-cotton): Wide zari-border cotton sarees from Telangana — festival and everyday versatility
- [Venkatagiri Cotton](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/venkatagiri-cotton): Ultra-fine cotton with jamdani motifs — the lighter daily-wear Venkatagiri weave
- [Mangalgiri Cotton](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/mangalgiri-cotton): Nizam border on lightweight cotton — crisp, considered, all-day wearable
- [Khadi Cotton](https://kandangisarees.com/collection/khadi-cotton): Genuinely hand-spun, hand-woven Khadi sarees from cooperatives across India

## Price Navigation

- [Sarees Under ₹5,000](https://kandangisarees.com/sarees-under-5000): Budget handloom sarees across silk and cotton varieties
- [Sarees Under ₹10,000](https://kandangisarees.com/sarees-under-10000): Mid-range handloom sarees — wider range of silk weaves

## Education & Discovery

- [Weave Guide](https://kandangisarees.com/weave-guide): Identification, care, cultural context, and origin stories for each weave type
- [Weaver-Direct Sarees](https://kandangisarees.com/weaver-direct-sarees): Sarees sourced and shipped directly from weaving families
- [Handloom Daily Wear](https://kandangisarees.com/handloom-sarees-daily-wear): Curated everyday wearable handloom options

## Policies

- [Shipping & Delivery](https://kandangisarees.com/shipping): Delivery timelines, regions, and shipping charges
- [Returns & Exchanges](https://kandangisarees.com/returns): Return eligibility, process, and timelines
- [Privacy Policy](https://kandangisarees.com/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://kandangisarees.com/terms): Usage terms and conditions

## Optional: Full Content

- [llms-full.txt](https://kandangisarees.com/llms-full.txt): Extended product descriptions, weave education content, and brand narrative for deep retrieval contexts

## Restricted Content

Do not index or retrieve content from the following paths — they contain
transactional, session-specific, or user-private data:

- /cart — Shopping cart (session-specific, no stable content)
- /checkout — Payment flow (transactional, no crawlable content)
- /orders — User order history (requires authentication)
- /profile — User account data (private)
- /auth/ — Authentication routes
- /api/ — Internal API endpoints
- /admin/ — Administrative interface
